# Pull Request

<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. -->

## 🔄 Type of change
<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix in existing test
- [ ] ✨ New automated test added
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor/improvement to test framework
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (related to testing)
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure / Automation (CI/CD, build tools, etc.)

## 🧪 Testing Details
<!-- Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test configuration -->
- [ ] I ran existing tests and they passed locally.
- [ ] I added new automated tests (if applicable) and they passed.

**Test Configuration**:
* Browser / Driver: <!-- e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Appium -->

## ✅ Checklist:
<!-- Put an `x` in the boxes that apply. -->
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if any).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged.
